title: cupi
intro: Cupi plant, also known as Cuphea, is a genus of flowering plants native to the Americas, known for its vibrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cupi plant include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cupi plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
